error_signature: Document option missing in Header Parameters
title: Missing Document Option in WhatsApp Node
symptom: The 'Document' option is not available in the Header Parameters dropdown for approved templates in the WhatsApp Business node.
not_this_if: Document option appears in the dropdown
Using a different node or integration
root_cause: This is a known limitation of the WhatsApp Business Cloud node in n8n, where it fails to fetch the updated schema for certain template types, specifically the Document type.
fix_steps: Use the HTTP Request node instead of the WhatsApp Business node
Construct the API call with the appropriate payload including the document type
Execute the workflow to send the message
agent_instruction: Switch to using the HTTP Request node to send WhatsApp messages with document headers.
